title: Noodle Boxer
original_title: แสบสนิท ศิษย์ส่ายหน้า
overview: Sanit, a noodle chef that try to fulfilled his dream. To be a boxer. His friend Sab, an old school boxer that suffer injury at his leg. Song, a friend who's thinking that Sanit boxing career will never work out. Sit, an old school musician who teach him about step.
